name: SUNWAY-PA
summary: SUNWAY-PA is likely a preference share of Sunway Berhad, a Malaysian conglomerate listed on the Kuala Lumpur Stock Exchange (KLSE). Sunway Berhad operates in various sectors, including property development, construction, hospitality, retail, education, and healthcare. Preference shares typically offer a fixed dividend and have priority over ordinary shares in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution during liquidation.
